manuscript_role: Prevents post-freeze PubMedQA test tuning claims.
Defines what the agent is told before proposing experiments.
Documents hypothesis, expected gains, risks, and allowed claims.
Compares agent against random, manual, and reference controls.
Separates macro-F1 gains from reliability claims.
Restricts case examples to supervisor-informed illustrative audit, not expert consensus.
Needed before submission; language-editing tools are not authors.
Prevents legacy wrapper reruns from silently using the neutral no-auxiliary default.
